channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Parametric Insurance Expands as Communities Seek Faster Climate Disaster Recovery Funding
item.description: The article examines the growing use of parametric insurance as climate change increases the frequency and severity of natural disasters while traditional insurance models struggle to remain viable. U...

item.title: More Canadians turn to crowdfunding platforms to cover basic living expenses amid rising costs
item.description: A growing number of Canadians are turning to crowdfunding platforms such as GoFundMe to help cover essential living expenses as the cost of rent, groceries, and utilities continues to rise. According ...

item.title: Speculation Grows Over Possible Defections in Shiv Sena (UBT) as Party Leadership Denies Split Rumours

item.title: Nearly 100,000 Tennessee Residents Lose SNAP Benefits Following New Federal Eligibility Rules
item.description: A report by Tennessee Lookout examines the impact of recent federal changes to the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) that were enacted through the One Big Beautiful Bill Act. The articl...

item.title: Election Officials Raise Concerns Over Logistical Challenges From Trump's Mail Voting Executive Order
item.description: Election officials across the United States are expressing concern that President Donald Trump's executive order on mail voting could create significant administrative and logistical difficulties ahea...

item.title: Rep. Jamie Raskin Accuses FBI Director Kash Patel of Improperly Distributing Bonus Payments to Close Associates

item.title: Opinion Writer Warns Tennessee Redistricting Could Further Reduce Democratic Representation

item.title: Nigeria Seeks Better Ocean Data Systems to Improve Maritime Safety and Support Blue Economy Growth

item.title: Agent Island: macOS notch-based workspace for managing local AI coding agent sessions

item.description: This AllAfrica regional news roundup highlights several significant developments from across the continent on 16 June 2026. In Niger, the military-led government issued a decree provisionally revoking...

item.title: A Retrospective on Anne Heywood’s Career and Enduring Presence in Mid-Century Cinema
item.description: This article from Vintage Everyday celebrates the life, career, and screen presence of British actress and former model Anne Heywood (1931–2023). Rising to prominence during the 1950s and 1960s, Heywo...

item.title: Delayed Southwest Monsoon Deepens Rainfall Deficit, Water Shortages and Heatwave Concerns Across India
item.description: India is experiencing a delayed advance of the southwest monsoon, raising concerns about below-normal rainfall, water shortages and persistent high temperatures in several regions. According to data f...

item.description: In this opinion article, commentator Thom Hartmann argues that President Donald Trump and several members of his administration are preparing for the possibility of political and legal consequences if...

item.title: How Tina Turner and Peter Lindbergh Created the Iconic 1989 Eiffel Tower Photoshoot
item.description: In 1989, singer Tina Turner participated in a memorable photoshoot on the Eiffel Tower in Paris with renowned photographer Peter Lindbergh. The images, which later became closely associated with her a...

item.title: Study suggests many people choose less effective painkillers for menstrual cramps
item.description: A large analysis of supermarket purchase data suggests that many women may not be using the most effective medication for managing period cramps. Researchers examined a decade of loyalty card records ...

item.title: Forensic experts recover huge digital evidence including 100GB data from arrested suspect Anmol in Karachi drug case
